title: S33R Mizunos Tweaks
description: Adds several QoL changes to the resource pack Mizunos Craft.
body:
This pack requires Optifine for connected glass texture, CIT item renaming, and redefined sheep and dye colors.


I return with a pack for my fellow Mizunos enjoyers <3 This reource pack has several QoL changes that have bugged me slightly when using Mizunos. Some of these changes work to connect the pack more to Vanilla, such as in the case of the visual appearance of Purpur and Netherrack, while other changes are simply for aesthetics.

Also to note, this pack was not made in collaboration with the creator of Mizunos, and reaching out has not garnered a response from them. However, if requests are made by the creator to take it down I will oblige them. Just made this pack due to how often I use Mizunos, and to make the pack suited to my preferences.

Hope this benefits other Mizunos users <3

~ Seer
